io.mangoo.email.Mail

io.mangoo.email
 

  • Uses of Mail in io.mangoo.email

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Mail
    Mail.attachment(Path path)
    Adds a file as attachment to the mail
    Mail
    Mail.attachments(List<Path> paths)
    Adds a list of files as attachment to the mail
    Mail
    Mail.bcc(String... bccs)
    Sets one or more BCC address
    Mail
    Mail.cc(String... ccs)
    Sets one or more CC address
    Mail
    Mail.from(String fromAddress)
    Sets the FROM address
    Mail
    Mail.from(String fromName, String fromAddress)
    Sets the FROM address and name
    Mail
    Mail.header(String name, String value)
    Adds a header value
    Mail
    Mail.htmlMessage(String message)
    Adds html message text.
    Mail
    Mail.htmlMessage(String template, Map<String,Object> content)
    Adds html message text which uses a given template and content to render
    static Mail
    Mail.newMail()
    Creates a new mail instance
    Mail
    Mail.priority(int priority)
    Sets the email priority
    Mail
    Mail.replyTo(String replyTo)
    Sets REPLY-TO address
    Mail
    Mail.subject(String subject)
    Sets message subject with specified encoding to override default platform encoding.
    Mail
    Mail.textMessage(String message)
    Adds plain message text
    Mail
    Mail.textMessage(String template, Map<String,Object> content)
    Adds plain message text which uses a given template and content to render
    Mail
    Mail.to(String... tos)
    Sets one or more TO address

    Method
    Description
    void
    MailListener.process(Mail mail)
    Processes the given mail message and passes it to the underlying SMTP handling
